name: claude-memory-hub
description: Persistent memory system for Claude Code. Zero API key. Zero Python. 5 hooks + MCP server + SQLite FTS5.

scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/main.ts --outdir dist --target bun --entry-naming cli.js
scripts.build:hooks: bun build src/hooks-entry/post-tool-use.ts src/hooks-entry/session-end.ts src/hooks-entry/user-prompt-submit.ts src/hooks-entry/pre-compact.ts src/hooks-entry/post-compact.ts --outdir dist/hooks --target bun --entry-naming [name].js
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:cli && bun run build:hooks

author: TranHoaiHung
